name: New Listing Onboarding
description: Complete workflow for onboarding a new luxury property listing

steps.task: Analyze current market trends and comparable sales for the property location
Generate compelling AI-written description with SEO optimization
Verify listing compliance with GLVAR and fair housing regulations
Prepare automated inquiry responses and scheduling templates

name: Client Acquisition
description: Workflow for acquiring and qualifying new luxury real estate clients

steps.task: Analyze client preferences and budget requirements
Provide market insights tailored to client needs
Generate personalized property recommendations and outreach

name: Transaction Management
description: End-to-end workflow for managing luxury real estate transactions

steps.task: Review all transaction documents for legal compliance
Monitor market conditions during transaction period
Coordinate scheduling and communication between parties

name: Property Valuation
description: Automated property valuation workflow using AVM and market data

steps.task: Perform automated valuation model analysis
Validate valuation against current market trends and comparables
Ensure valuation disclosures meet regulatory requirements

name: Virtual Tour Creation
description: Workflow for creating immersive virtual property tours

steps.task: Generate 3D virtual tour from property photos and floor plans
Optimize tour narrative and highlight key features
Integrate tour into listing platform and client communications

name: Offer Negotiation
description: Strategic negotiation workflow for real estate offers

steps.task: Analyze incoming offers and market positioning
Provide real-time market data to inform negotiation strategy
Verify all negotiation communications comply with regulations
Facilitate communication and document exchanges

name: Data Synchronization
description: Workflow for maintaining real-time MLS/IDX data synchronization

steps.task: Connect to MLS/IDX feeds and validate data integrity
Ensure synchronized data meets fair housing and disclosure requirements
Analyze new data for market trend updates
